user.title: Kärcher Home Robots
user.description: Select your region to connect to the correct Kärcher cloud server.

credentials.title: Kärcher Account
credentials.description: Enter your Kärcher Home Robots app credentials.

device.title: Select Device
device.description: Multiple devices found. Select the one to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Kärcher
reauth_confirm.description: Your Kärcher credentials need to be updated.

hamh.title: Apple Home via Matter (optional)
hamh.description: If you use [Home Assistant Matter Hub](https://github.com/RiDDiX/home-assistant-matter-hub) to connect to Apple Home, enter its URL here. You can skip this step and configure it later via the integration's Configure button.

data.hamh_password: HAMH Password (leave blank if not set)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Kärcher cloud. Check your network.
error.no_devices: No devices found in this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
error.hamh_failed: HAMH error: {error}. Check the URL and that HAMH is running. You can clear the URL to skip this step and press 'Configure HAMH Bridge' later.

init.title: Apple Home via Matter (optional)
init.description: Enter the URL of your Home Assistant Matter Hub (HAMH) to enable one-click bridge configuration. Leave blank if you are not using HAMH.

data.hamh_password: HAMH Password (leave blank if not set)
